introSection: Caterpillar Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently located at Primrose Valley Holiday Park in Filey, North Yorkshire, England, UK.
fullText: Caterpillar Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently located at Primrose Valley Holiday Park in Filey, North Yorkshire, England, UK.
